dashboard.hero.title: Compare prices. Save more. Shop smarter.
dashboard.hero.subtitle: Create your shopping list and find out which supermarkets offer the best prices for you.
dashboard.features.title: How does it work?
dashboard.features.compare.title: Smart Comparator
dashboard.features.compare.text: Search products and compare prices per unit in real time.
dashboard.features.lists.title: List Management
dashboard.features.lists.text: Create, edit and optimize your shopping baskets easily.
dashboard.features.location.title: Geolocation
dashboard.features.location.text: Find the cheapest supermarket near your location.
dashboard.features.pantry.title: Pantry Management
dashboard.features.pantry.text: Track your kitchen stock and avoid buying products you already have.
